text:
Value Modifier payment adjustment for any but one practice.
PQRS_USE_IEP PQRS IEP measures will be used for the practice if available Indicator for whether PQRS individual eligible professional (IEP) measures will be used for practice if available 1320 Num 8 Equals 1 if PQRS individual eligible professional (IEP) measures will be used for practice if available
PQRS_HAS_CASES_IEP_SE Practice has PQRS measures to display in the IEP supplementary exhibit Indicator for whether practice has measures
